title: Crunchy Tunisian Fajita Tacos
description: A flavorful twist on traditional fajitas, featuring crunchy vegetables and a hint of Tunisian spice. Serve in tacos for a delicious and easy meal.

ingredients.name: Crunchy Topping (optional)
ingredients.amount: 1 cup, chopped fresh cilantro, crumbled queso fresco, or diced radish

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced fajita meat (if using) and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the Tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced fajita meat (if not already added) and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Warm the tacos according to the package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the fajita mixture onto a warmed taco and topping with your desired crunchy topping.
